---
title: "Symptom Severity Effect on Task Performance"
output: github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Data Loading and Preprocessing

```{r load-prep}
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

# Load data
df <- read_csv("../../data/behav_data/behavior_and_questionnaires.csv")

# Preprocess: enforce types
df <- df %>%
	mutate(
		ID = as.factor(ID),
		Group = as.factor(Group),
		Gender = as.factor(Gender),
		Condition = as.factor(Condition),
		Age = as.numeric(Age),
		`BDI-II` = as.numeric(`BDI-II`),
		DERS = as.numeric(DERS),
		STAI1 = as.numeric(STAI1),
		STAI2 = as.numeric(STAI2),
		Accuracy = as.numeric(Accuracy),
		ReactionTime = as.numeric(ReactionTime)
	)
```

## Linear Mixed Model: Reaction Time

```{r lmm-rt}
# Model: RT ~ BDI-II + DERS + STAI1 + STAI2 + (1|ID)
lmm_rt <- lmer(ReactionTime ~ `BDI-II` + DERS + STAI1 + STAI2 + (1|ID),
							data = df, REML = TRUE)
summary(lmm_rt)
anova(lmm_rt, type = 3)
```

## Linear Mixed Model: Accuracy

```{r lmm-accuracy}
# Model: Accuracy ~ BDI-II + DERS + STAI1 + STAI2 + (1|ID)
lmm_acc <- lmer(Accuracy ~ `BDI-II` + DERS + STAI1 + STAI2 + (1|ID),
							 data = df, REML = TRUE)
summary(lmm_acc)
anova(lmm_acc, type = 3)
```

## Export Results

```{r export-results, eval=FALSE}
# Optionally export fixed effects tables
write.csv(coef(summary(lmm_rt)), "results/lmm_rt_bdi_ders_stai.csv")
write.csv(coef(summary(lmm_acc)), "results/lmm_accuracy_bdi_ders_stai.csv")

library(readr)
# Export as semicolon-separated, rounded to 3 decimals
rt_out <- coef(summary(lmm_rt))
acc_out <- coef(summary(lmm_acc))
rt_out <- as.data.frame(rt_out)
acc_out <- as.data.frame(acc_out)
rt_out <- dplyr::mutate_if(rt_out, is.numeric, ~round(., 3))
acc_out <- dplyr::mutate_if(acc_out, is.numeric, ~round(., 3))
write_delim(rt_out, "results/lmm_rt_bdi_ders_stai.csv", delim = ";")
write_delim(acc_out, "results/lmm_accuracy_bdi_ders_stai.csv", delim = ";")
```
